name: Sentinel Bisect
postCreateCommand: python -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && pip install -e . && cp -n .env.example .env && python fixtures/build_fixture.py
postAttachCommand: echo 'Environment ready. Try: source .venv/bin/activate && sentinel-bisect --repo fixtures/flaky-regression-demo --command "pytest -q tests/test_calculator.py" --serve'
